Went

Microsoft Build //localhost:Pune

Sat, Jun 13 · 10:00 AM IST
AIT Global, Office no 1105, Nyati Enthral, Kharadi, Pune, IN

Microsoft Build //localhost is a series of local, community-driven "after-party" events that follow the main Microsoft Build conference.

-----
📍Location:
AIT Global, Office no 1105, 11th Floor, Nyati Enthral, Kharadi, Pune
Landmark: Opp. Reliance Smart, Kharadi
🗺️ Locate on Google Map

  • Space is limited to "120 seats" for this event.
  • Cancel your registration if you do not plan on attending.
  • Please be ready to present your registration confirmation email at the door, if requested.

-----

Agenda:

⏰ 10:00 AM to 10:30 AM IST
Registration, Welcome, and Introduction
by Nanddeep Nachan and Siddharth Vaghasia (Organizers)
---------------------------------------------

⏰ 10:30 AM to 11:30 AM IST
Build context‑aware agents at scale with Microsoft IQ
Level: (300) Advanced

High performance agents are built on intelligence that brings together context, enterprise data, orchestration, and governance. Learn how Foundry IQ, Fabric IQ, and Work IQ provide the enterprise intelligence layer for AI agents. Design agents that can search across organizational knowledge, reason over business data, and operate with awareness of people and work signals. Take action within trusted boundaries, providing a practical foundation for building scalable and reliable agents

by Siddharth Vaghasia (Microsoft MVP)
---------------------------------------------

⏰ 11:30 AM to 01:00 PM IST
Hands on Lab:
Working with Models: Get Started with Models in Microsoft Foundry to Build AI Apps
Level: (300) Advanced

In this hands-on lab, you will build a production-ready AI application using Microsoft Foundry, with no fine-tuning or deep machine learning expertise required. You will discover and select models, provision a Foundry project, and connect to a hosted model using the OpenAI SDK. You’ll implement a comment moderation workflow, compare model outputs, and package the solution as a hosted agent using Python, ready for real-world integration.

by Nanddeep Nachan (Microsoft MVP, MCT) and Smita Nachan (Microsoft MVP)
---------------------------------------------

⏰ 01:00 PM to 02:00 PM IST
🍴🍕 Lunch ( Your lunch is on us! )🥤🍴
---------------------------------------------

⏰ 02:00 PM to 03:00 PM IST
Developer Tools & Frameworks: Your agent, anywhere: MultiClient, MultiDevice with GitHub Copilot SDK

Level: (300) Advanced
Agents are powerful on your machine, but what happens when you need them everywhere else? In this session, we'll show how GitHub Copilot SDK lets you build an agent, embed it in an app, and take it with you across devices and into the cloud. You'll see how to go from a local agent to one you can access on your phone, move between machines, and run across multiple clients. If you've been working with agents locally and wondering what the next step looks like, this is it.

by Kunj Sangani (M365 Consultant)
---------------------------------------------

⏰ 03:00 PM to 04:00 PM IST
Responsible AI: Observability for AI agents on any framework
Level: (300) Advanced

Nondeterministic, multi-agent systems break traditional monitoring. As agents move into production, developers need observability built into the workflow, not bolted on after failures. This session explores what modern observability looks like for AI agents: how tracing and evaluation must work across any framework, why the inner loop deserves the same rigor as the outer, how context-specific evals evolve with your agent, and how always-on signals tie behavior to business outcomes.

by Dr. Mahender Nakrani (AI Solution Architect, AIT Global)
---------------------------------------------

This in-person event is built for developers and cloud engineers who want to design, build, and deploy real-world AI solutions on Azure. Expect a hands-on, implementation-focused experience using Microsoft Foundry and GitHub Copilot with live demos, guided labs, and practical developer workflows.

What to expect:

  • Key takeaways and announcements from Microsoft Build 2026
  • Deep dive into Azure AI and Generative AI use cases
  • Live demos with Microsoft Foundry and GitHub Copilot
  • Hands-on labs to build and test AI-powered features end-to-end
  • Best practices for building AI-powered applications
  • Networking with the local AI developer community

Whether you're shipping your first AI feature or scaling production systems, this event is designed to give you actionable insights to accelerate your AI journey with Microsoft.
---------------------------------------------

👮 Attendees Guidelines
Please carefully review the following guidelines to ensure a smooth and secure event experience for everyone.

📝 Registration & Entry

  • To keep things running smoothly, please ensure you arrive by 10:30 AM IST, as entry will not be permitted after that time.
  • Attendance is subject to a confirmation email from the Pune Tech Community.
  • Please note that the registration email sent by Meetup does not serve as an entry pass for the event.
  • Please do carry your laptop and charger to carry out your hands-on lab.
  • Entry will be permitted only after verification of a valid Government-issued photo ID proof.

🛡️ Security & Venue Policies

  • Visitors are required to obtain a Visitor Badge at the respective building reception and must remain escorted throughout their stay on the premises.
  • Temporary visitor passes must be returned to the receptionist before leaving the premises.
  • Visitors must strictly adhere to the “No Photography” and “No Smoking” policies within the campus.
  • Any misconduct, policy violation, or non-compliance with venue regulations may result in denial of entry or removal from the event premises.

🚗 Parking & Transportation

  • Visitors are requested to park their vehicles only in the designated parking areas provided.
  • Entry on two-wheelers without a helmet will not be permitted.

🤝 Code of Conduct

  • Attendees are expected to maintain professional and respectful behavior toward organizers, security personnel, venue staff, and fellow participants.
  • Please cooperate with all security and operational procedures to help us conduct the event smoothly and efficiently.
  • We encourage all attendees to contribute toward creating a safe, inclusive, and positive environment for everyone.

---------------------------------------------
See you there!

👉 More details, surprises, and announcements in the coming days.
The experience will be truly amazing! 💃🕺

487 attendees
Went

GitHub Copilot Dev Days | Pune (In-Person)

Sat, May 16 · 9:30 AM IST
Principal Global Services Private Limited, Tower 16, Cybercity, Magarpatta City, Hadapsar , Pune, Maharashtra, India - 411013., Pune, IN

GitHub Copilot Dev Days is a global initiative led by Microsoft that brings hands-on, in-person learning experiences to developer communities worldwide. These events are designed to help developers explore the power of AI-assisted coding using GitHub Copilot in real-world scenarios.

The event brings together developers and tech enthusiasts for interactive workshops, live demos, and guided labs. Participants get practical experience using AI tools to write, review, and optimize code more efficiently.

Focused on accessibility and community learning, GitHub Copilot Dev Days welcomes all skill levels and encourages collaboration, innovation, and knowledge sharing - empowering developers to build faster and smarter with AI.

--------------------------------------------
📍Location:
Principal Global Services,
Tower 16, Cybercity, Magarpatta, Hadapsar, Pune - 411013
🗺️ Locate on Google Map
--------------------------------------------

by Avijit Chaudhuri & Pranjal Jain (Principal Global Services)
---------------------------------------------

⏰ 11:15 AM to 11:30 AM IST

---------------------------------------------

⏰ 11:30 AM to 12:15 PM IST
Code Faster, Think Bigger: GitHub Copilot in Action
by Swami Nawale (Microsoft MVP)
---------------------------------------------

⏰ 12:15 PM to 01:00 PM IST

by Siddharth Vaghasia (Microsoft MVP) and Kunj Sangani (M365 Consultant)
---------------------------------------------

⏰ 01:00 PM to 01:15 PM IST
Closing notes
by Smita Nachan and Kunj Sangani (Organizers)
---------------------------------------------

SharePoint at 25: A Legacy of Collaboration

Sat, Feb 28 · 10:00 AM IST
·
Online
Online

A community-led celebration, brought to you by Pune Tech Community and the M365 Ahmedabad User Group.

For 25 years, SharePoint has been at the heart of workplace collaboration— powering intranets, document management, and knowledge sharing for organizations across the globe.

This virtual event celebrates SharePoint’s journey from its early days to the modern Microsoft 365 era, highlighting key milestones, real-world experiences, and lessons learned along the way.

Join industry experts and community voices as we reflect on the past, understand the present, and explore what lies ahead for SharePoint.

📱 Get the updates on the App.
--------------------------------------------

How to join?
Join with MS Teams meeting

  • Track 1
  • Track 2

--------------------------------------------

by Jenkins NS (Microsoft MVP)
---------------------------------------------

by Sai Siva Ram Bandaru (Capgemini, Senior Consultant)

🏛️️ Track 2

by Dhruvin Shah (Microsoft MVP)

by Aroh Shukla (Microsoft MVP)

Handling Microsoft Teams with Document Management in SharePoint
by Chirag Patel (Microsoft MVP)

Global Power Platform & Agent Bootcamp, Pune 2026 (In-Person)

Sat, Feb 21 · 10:00 AM IST
Fujitsu Consulting India, A-15, Talawade Chakan Rd, M I D C Technology Park, Talwade, Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra 411062, Pune, IN

A Power Platform Festival

In this FREE bootcamp, we will deep-dive into Microsoft’s Power Platform stack with hands-on sessions delivered to you by experts and community leaders.

📱 Get the updates on the App.

--------------------------------------------
📍Location:
Fujitsu Consulting India

A-15, Talawade Chakan Rd, M I D C Technology Park, Talwade, Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra 412114
🗺️ Locate on Google Map
--------------------------------------------

In this bootcamp, we will deep-dive into Microsoft’s Power Platform stack with hands-on sessions, delivered to you by the experts and community leaders on below topics:

  • Power Apps
  • Power Automate
  • Power BI
  • Microsoft Copilot Studio
  • Power Pages
  • Microsoft Dataverse
  • AI Builder
  • Data Connectors
  • Microsoft Fabric

--------------------------------------------

Who can attend?

  • This event is open to a wide range of participants, including IT professionals, developers, business users, and anyone interested in learning Power Platform.
  • Having a basic understanding of Power Platform and related concepts can enhance your experience.
  • Some sessions might target beginners, while others may assume a certain level of expertise.

M365 Saturday, Pune 2025-26 (In-Person)

Sat, Jan 31 · 9:30 AM IST
Data-Axle Solutions, ICC Tech Park Tower A, Senapati Bapat Rd, Laxmi Society, Model Colony, Shivajinagar, Pune, IN

M365 Saturday Events are FREE events held in different cities around the world, featuring sessions from influential and respected professionals around all (but not exclusively) topics around Microsoft 365 (Copilot, SharePoint, Microsoft Teams, Microsoft Graph, and Power Platform).

📱 Get the updates on the App.
--------------------------------------------

📍Location:
Data Axle Solutions India,
8th Floor, ICC Tech Tower, Senapati Bapat Rd, Laxmi Society,
Model Colony, Shivajinagar, Pune, Maharashtra - 411016

🗺️ Locate on Google Map
--------------------------------------------

M365 Saturday Pune is a free community‐focused technology event dedicated to educating and engaging members of the local technical community.

With the expansion of the Microsoft 365 platform, the event now draws upon the expertise of IT professionals, developers and solutions architects who come together to share their real-world experiences, lessons learned, best practices, and general knowledge with other like‐minded individuals.

These individuals bring invaluable experience and lessons across the broad suite of services Microsoft offers like: Copilot, SharePoint, Microsoft Teams, Microsoft Viva, Power Platform, and other M365 applications.

Copilot Developer Camp - Pune (In-Person)

Sat, Nov 29, 2025 · 9:30 AM IST
AIT Global, Office no 1105, Nyati Enthral, Kharadi, Pune, IN

Join us for an immersive Copilot Developer Camp!

This a full-day, in-person event packed with sessions followed by an engaging Ideathon.

This full-day, hands-on camp is designed to help you:

  • 🤖 Learn how to build your own Copilot agents using Copilot Studio and Microsoft Foundry
  • 🧠 Dive deep into M365 extensibility Development.
  • 💬 Collaborate with fellow developers and bring your Copilot ideas to life through an Ideathon
  • 💼 Network with industry experts and Microsoft engineers

--------------------------------------------
📍Location:
AIT Global, Office no 1105, 11th Floor, Nyati Enthral, Kharadi, Pune
Landmark: Opp. Reliance Smart, Kharadi
🗺️ Locate on Google Map
--------------------------------------------

Please note:

  • This event is NOT for Students and Freshers.
  • Attendees limit: 60 seats only (The seat confirmation email will be sent 5 days prior to selected attendees)

Make sure to bring your own laptop with the Charger and necessary adapter, if required.

---------------------------------------------
Agenda:
⏰ 09:30 AM to 10:00 AM IST
Registration, Welcome, and Introduction
by Nanddeep Nachan and Siddharth Vaghasia (Organizers)
---------------------------------------------

⏰ 10:00 AM to 10:30 AM IST
Keynote: Understanding Copilot Extensibility
Explore how Copilot can be customized, extended, and integrated to solve real-world business challenges.
by Kamal Shree (Senior Developer Advocate at Microsoft)
---------------------------------------------

⏰ 10:30 AM to 11:30 AM IST
Unleashing the Power of Custom Agents with Copilot Studio
In the Maker Path, learn to create custom agents to automate tasks, enhance productivity, and deliver a seamless Microsoft 365 experience.
by Smita Nachan (Microsoft MVP) and Omprakash Pandey (Synergetics Information Technology Services India Pvt. Ltd.)

---------------------------------------------

⏰ 11:30 AM to 12:30 PM IST
Extend Microsoft 365 Copilot with Declarative Agents
In the Extend Path, build a secure, fully skilled declarative assistant for HR, starting from fundamentals to advanced capabilities, with Microsoft 365 authentication to access organizational data.
by Omprakash Pandey (Synergetics Information Technology Services India Pvt. Ltd.)
---------------------------------------------

⏰ 12:30 PM to 01:30 PM IST
🍴🍕 Lunch ( Your lunch is on us! )🥤🍴
---------------------------------------------

⏰ 01:30 PM to 02:30 PM IST
Build Custom Engine Agents using Microsoft 365 Agents SDK
In the Build Path, dive into creating custom engine agents for Microsoft 365 Copilot and Teams. Choose between C# with the Agents SDK for full orchestration control across channels or TypeScript with the Teams AI Library for a streamlined Teams-focused experience.
by Kunj Sangani (M365 Consultant) and Nanddeep Nachan (Microsoft MVP)
---------------------------------------------

⏰ 02:30 PM to 04:00 PM IST
Hack Ideas into Agents: A Copilot Ideathon
Participants work in groups/pairs to identify challenges, brainstorm solutions, and rapidly prototype agents using Copilot Studio.
---------------------------------------------

⏰ 04:30 PM to 05:00 PM IST
Demo/Presentation
Teams showcase their prototypes, highlighting creativity, innovation, and the power of Copilot.
---------------------------------------------

⏰ 05:00 PM to 05:30 PM IST
Closing Remarks
Winner Announcement and Feedback
by Smita Nachan and Kunj Sangani (Organizers)
---------------------------------------------

👮 Attendees Guidelines
Kindly take note of the following Visitor Procedures:

  • Attendees are allowed subject to confirmation email, as we have 60 lab environments to offer.
  • Visitors are allowed subject to verification of the Govt. ID proof.
  • Please do carry your laptop and charger to carry out your ideathon.
  • Visitors are requested to park their vehicles only at designated parking areas provided.
  • Entry on 2-wheelers is not permitted without a helmet.
  • Visitors need to obtain “Visitors Badge” at respective building reception and need to be escorted throughout their stay in the premises.
  • Visitors should return the temporary visitor pass to the receptionist at the end of their visit.
  • Visitors must abide by the "No Photography" & "No Smoking" policies on the premises.

Why Attend?
Microsoft 365 Productivity Day offers a unique opportunity to gain insights from industry experts, share best practices, and network with peers who are equally passionate about maximizing efficiency.
Whether you're an IT professional, business leader, or an end-user, this conference will equip you with the tools and knowledge to leverage Microsoft 365 for superior productivity.

Who Should Attend?

  • Business Leaders: Discover how to drive organizational efficiency and collaboration with Microsoft 365.
  • IT Professionals: Gain technical insights into deploying and managing Microsoft 365 applications.
  • End-Users: Learn practical tips and tricks to enhance your daily productivity using Microsoft 365 tools.

Copilot Developer Camp - Pune (In-Person)

Sat, Apr 26, 2025 · 10:00 AM IST
AIT Global, Office no 1105, Nyati Enthral, Kharadi, Pune, IN

Join us for an immersive Copilot Developer Camp!

This hands-on workshop is only for professional developers, SI’s, ISV’s who want to learn how to extend Microsoft 365 Copilot or build a completely custom agent for Microsoft 365 Copilot.

This camp is a free, one-day workshop post AI tour.

--------------------------------------------
📍Location:
AIT Global, Office no 1105, 11th Floor, Nyati Enthral, Kharadi, Pune
Landmark: Opp. Reliance Smart, Kharadi
🗺️ Locate on Google Map
--------------------------------------------

Microsoft 365 Copilot is an AI-powered assistant that helps you work more efficiently and effectively. To truly benefit from it, you need to grant it access to all information in your organization. Microsoft 365 Copilot offers rich extensibility capabilities.

After completing this workshop, you'll be able to:

  • Evaluate whether to extend Microsoft 365 Copilot, or build your own custom AI solution
  • Describe the ways in which you can extend Microsoft 365 Copilot and understand when to use which approach
  • Design, implement and use extensions in Microsoft 365 Copilot

The workshop will provide hands-on labs for you to practice the skills needed to extend Microsoft 365 Copilot. To make full use of the labs, you will need to bring your own laptop with you.

This workshop is a must for architects, technical decision makers, and developers - who want to help their organizations benefit from Microsoft 365 Copilot.

Please note:

  • This event is NOT for Students and Freshers.
  • Attendees limit: 60 seats only

Make sure to bring your own laptop with the Charger and necessary adapter, if required.
---------------------------------------------

Agenda:

⏰ 10:00 AM to 10:30 AM IST

by Nanddeep Nachan and Kamal Shree (Microsoft)
---------------------------------------------

Keynote
by Vaibhav Deshpande (AIT Global)

⏰ 11:00 AM to 12:00 PM IST

Proctors: Kamal Shree, Kunj Sangani, Nanddeep Nachan, Sandeep Mishra, Smita Nachan, and Vardhaman Deshpande
---------------------------------------------

⏰ 12:00 PM to 01:00 PM IST

Proctors: Kamal Shree, Kunj Sangani, Nanddeep Nachan, Sandeep Mishra, Smita Nachan, and Vardhaman Deshpande

Sat, Mar 8, 2025 · 9:30 AM IST
Coditas Technologies, Gaia Apex, Viman Nagar, Viman Nagar, Pune, Maharashtra, Pune, IN

The Global AI Bootcamp is a series of free one-day events organized across the world by local communities that are passionate about artificial intelligence on Microsoft Azure.

The Global AI Bootcamp is an annual event that occurs worldwide, where developers and AI enthusiasts can learn about AI through workshops, sessions, and discussions.

🎉 All attendees will receive exclusive digital badges of attendance to showcase their participation! 📛
🚀 Don't miss this chance to earn your badge and celebrate your learning journey!

📱 Get the updates on the App.
📽️ Watch the Global AI Keynote 2025
--------------------------------------------
📍Location: Coditas, 4th floor, Gaia Apex, Viman Nagar, Pune
🗺️ Locate on Google Map
--------------------------------------------

A full day of learning about AI
Learn how to implement AI solutions using pre-trained AI services like Cognitive Services and Bot Framework, or by building your own machine learning models with Azure ML and open-source frameworks like PyTorch and ML.NET. By the end of the day, you will be able to infuse AI into your applications.

---------------------------------------------

M365 Saturday Pune is a free community‐focused technology event dedicated to educating and engaging members of the local technical community.

With the expansion of the Microsoft 365 platform, the event now draws upon the expertise of IT professionals, developers and solutions architects who come together to share their real-world experiences, lessons learned, best practices, and general knowledge with other like‐minded individuals.

These individuals bring invaluable experience and lessons across the broad suite of services Microsoft offers like: Copilot, SharePoint, Microsoft Teams, Microsoft Viva, Power Platform, and other M365 applications.

---------------------------------------------

Attendees Guidelines
Kindly take note of the following Visitor Procedures:

  • Visitors are allowed subject to verification of the Govt. ID proof.
  • Please do NOT carry laptop or electronic gadgets to the event (except mobile).
  • Visitors are requested to park their vehicles only at designated parking areas provided.
  • Entry on 2-wheelers is not permitted without a helmet.
  • Visitors need to obtain “Visitors Badge” at respective building reception and need to be escorted throughout their stay in the premises.
  • Visitors should return the temporary visitor pass to the receptionist at the end of their visit.
  • Visitors must abide by the "No Photography" & "No Smoking" policies on the premises.

---------------------------------------------

The experience will be truly amazing! 💃🕺

100 attendees
Went

Growing younger using Microsoft Technology

Fri, Aug 23, 2024 · 6:30 PM IST
·
Online
Online

As we get busy with our work and family (esp. with young kids), we often neglect personal health. With a small adjustment in diet, minimal exercise & monitoring health metrics with Microsoft Technology, one can actually "grow younger" - metabolically speaking and mentally.

How to join?

  • Join with MS Teams Meeting

Here's an example of using Microsoft Power Platform and the Azure stack to get and make sense of our health reports.

Below is an outline of steps that has worked for me:

  1. Training / developing an Azure AI model (custom extraction) to scan our health reports.
  2. These reports are temporarily stored in an Azure Blob for ease and further loaded to the AI model using an Azure Function.
  3. The Azure function gets the results from AI model and hands to a Power Apps connector which brings the data over to Power Apps.
  4. We further send the data over to Azure Open AI (GPT4o) for interpretation of results.
  5. This is part of the tech that is used to better personal health. Naturally we could also use AI builder and above approach gives us more options as we'd be on a power apps license anyway.

See you there!

A full day of learning about AI
Learn how to implement AI solutions using pre-trained AI services like Cognitive Services and Bot Framework, or by building your own machine learning models with Azure ML and open-source frameworks like PyTorch and ML.NET. By the end of the day, you will be able to infuse AI into your applications.

Transition from Developer to Software Architect: Unlock Mastery Skills

Sat, Feb 10, 2024 · 10:00 AM IST
AIT Global India Pvt. Ltd., 46 101A, Nagar Rd, Pune, IN

⚠️To make the most of this workshop, it's recommended that attendees should have more than FOUR years of software industry experience.

During this workshop, we'll be covering the following topics:

  • A Mindset of an Architect
  • Characteristics of a Successful Architect
  • Leader in an Architect
  • Habits of an Architect
  • Skills of an Architect

We'll also tackle the pressing questions that arise for every seasoned software developer:

  • How to learn core concepts faster?
  • How to implement what you learned in your project?
  • How to become highly productive?
  • 5 Simple tools that make you more productive.
  • How to cope with stress in the fast-paced world?
  • How to overcome procrastination?
  • How to see the big picture when architecting solutions?
  • How to write simple architectural documents that can be understood by all stakeholders - a pragmatic approach?
  • How to increase your salary?
  • How to position yourself as an architect so that you can automatically get opportunities?
  • Adapting to the new environment and becoming an architect with the most influence?
  • How to build a high-quality team?
  • How to build a new team from the ground up?
  • How to build a self-motivated team?
  • How to motivate your team without any fake pep talks?
  • How to motivate your team to adapt to new technologies, even though your project does not facilitate new technologies?
  • How to lead a team without being a manager?
  • How to be an ethical leader?
  • How to balance your professional and personal life?
  • How to express your ideas to upper management?
  • How to sell yourself without coming off as a salesperson?
  • How to overcome the feeling of stagnation in your career?
  • How to overcome the fear of becoming obsolete in your company?
  • How to ignore politics and still climb the corporate ladder?
  • How to become successful despite heavy competition?
  • How to build your digital presence?
  • How to become a demon developer?
  • How to keep yourself updated on these changing technologies?
  • How not to feel insecure in your office?

See you there!

Join us for a full day in-person Software Architect workshop at Pune!

AIT Global India Pvt. Ltd.

.NET Conf Pune 2023 (Virtual)

Sat, Jan 20, 2024 · 11:00 AM IST
·
Online
Online

.NET Conf is a FREE, three-day, virtual developer event that celebrates the major releases of the .NET development platform. It is co-organized by the .NET community and Microsoft, and sponsored by the .NET Foundation along with our ecosystem partners.

.NET Conf Pune 2023 is an annual conference for .NET developers worldwide, and we are excited to host it online this year. It's a great opportunity to connect with fellow developers, learn about the latest developments in .NET, and explore the future of software development.

This event celebrates the launch of .NET 8 at .NET Conf 2023 on 14 November, 2023.

Secure your cloud with Azure VPN

Fri, Jan 19, 2024 · 6:30 PM IST
·
Online
Online

A virtual private network (VPN) provides a secure encrypted connection across another network.

An Azure VPN gateway is a specific type of virtual network gateway that is used to send and receive encrypted traffic between an Azure virtual network and an on-premises location over the public Internet.

Azure VPN gateways can also be used to connect separate Azure virtual networks using an encrypted tunnel across the Microsoft network backbone.

---------------------------------------------
How to join?

  • Join with MS Teams meeting

---------------------------------------------

See you there!

City Centre - Kolte Patil, Hinjewadi Phase 1 Rd, Pimpri-Chinchwad, IN

Global AI Conference is an event organized by Global AI Community. It is designed to give an introduction to the world of AI, and showcase relevant technologies. Global AI Conference Pune is in-person event that hold on Pune, India.

📍 Location:
BinaryRoots,
Office 404, City Center Kolte Patil,
Next to Symbiosis Cherry Blossom (D) boys Hostel,
Phase 1, Hinjewadi Rajiv Gandhi Infotech Park, Hinjewadi,
Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra - 411057

We extend a warm welcome to the upcoming Azure AI hands-on workshop.

Agenda:

  • Welcome and Introduction
  • Introduction to Azure Open AI​ Service by Siddharth Vaghasia
  • Using Azure OpenAI service models​ and key concepts by Kunj Sangani
  • Prompt Engineering and it's importance by Smita Nachan
  • Understanding Embeddings and Semantic Search by Nanddeep Nachan
  • Global AI Workshop Hands-on

To ensure a smooth and productive experience, we kindly request your attention to the following instructions:

  1. Laptop Requirement:
  • Please bring your personal laptop to the workshop.
  • Ensure it is adequately charged, and do bring the power adapter to avoid any interruptions during the session.
  1. Foundational AI Knowledge:
  • This workshop assumes a foundational understanding of AI concepts.
  • Reviewing these principles beforehand will enhance your engagement with the material.
  1. Azure Proficiency:
  • Given the nature of the workshop, familiarity with the Azure platform is imperative.
  • Prior experience in navigating Azure services will facilitate a more comprehensive comprehension of the topics covered.
  1. Workshop Engagement:
  • Approach the workshop with a positive and inquisitive mindset.
  • Active participation is key to extracting the utmost value from the event.
  • Engage with fellow participants and take advantage of networking opportunities.

We look forward to an enriching and collaborative learning experience. Your preparedness in adhering to these instructions will undoubtedly contribute to the overall success of the workshop.

See you there!

Kick Start Your Azure OpenAI Journey Step by Step (Part 3 of 3)

Sat, Dec 2, 2023 · 11:00 AM IST
·
Online
Online

Welcome to the 3 part series to kick start your Azure OpenAI journey!

---------------------------------------------
How to join?

  • Join with MS Teams meeting

---------------------------------------------

This session will build on the knowledge you gained in Part 2 of this series and will teach you how to:

  1. Perform fine-tuning on Azure OpenAI models
  2. Secure your Azure OpenAI service
  3. Use Azure AI Content Safety to protect your users
  4. See demos of Azure OpenAI in action
  5. This session is intended for anyone who is interested in learning more about how to use Azure OpenAI to power their own AI solutions.

Agenda:

  • Fine tuning: In this section, we will discuss how to fine tune Azure OpenAI models to improve their performance on specific tasks.
  • Security: We will then talk about how to secure your Azure OpenAI service from unauthorized access and misuse.
  • Content Safety: We will also discuss how to use Azure AI Content Safety to protect your users from harmful content.
  • Demos: Finally, we will give you a live demonstration of Azure OpenAI in action.

Here are some additional safety considerations that will be covered in the session:

  • The importance of using Azure OpenAI responsibly and ethically
  • The need to be aware of the potential risks of using AI, such as bias and discrimination
  • The importance of using Azure OpenAI in a way that protects user privacy

We hope this session will help you to use Azure OpenAI safely and responsibly.

See you there!

82 attendees
Went

Introduction to Azure PIM

Fri, Nov 24, 2023 · 6:30 PM IST
·
Online
Online

Privileged Identity Management (PIM) is a service in Microsoft Entra ID that enables you to manage, control, and monitor access to important resources in your organization.

Organizations want to minimize the number of people who have access to secure information or resources, because that reduces the chance of
a malicious actor getting access of an authorized user inadvertently impacting a sensitive resource.

In this session, we will get introduced to PIM and it's benefits.

---------------------------------------------
How to join?

  • Join with MS Teams meeting

---------------------------------------------

52 attendees
Went

Kick Start Your Azure OpenAI Journey Step by Step (Part 2 of 3)

Sat, Nov 4, 2023 · 11:00 AM IST
·
Online
Online

Welcome to the 3 part series to kick start your Azure OpenAI journey!

This session is intended for anyone who is interested in learning more about Azure OpenAI and how to use it to power their own AI solutions.

---------------------------------------------
How to join?

  • Join with MS Teams meeting

---------------------------------------------

This session will provide a basic understanding of Azure OpenAI, including:

  1. How to get access to Azure OpenAI
  2. The different models available in Azure OpenAI
  3. Use cases for Azure OpenAI
  4. Responsible AI considerations when using Azure OpenAI
  5. Pricing for Azure OpenAI
  6. How to deploy Azure OpenAI
  7. How to work with text models in Azure OpenAI

Agenda:

  • Getting access to Azure OpenAI: In this section, we will discuss how to create an Azure subscription and how to enable the Azure OpenAI service.
  • Models in Azure OpenAI: We will then explore the different models that are available in Azure OpenAI, including the Codex, Curie, and Dactyl models.
  • Use cases: We will discuss some of the different use cases for Azure OpenAI, such as generating text, translating languages, and writing different kinds of creative content.
  • Responsible AI: We will also discuss the importance of responsible AI when using Azure OpenAI. This includes considerations such as bias mitigation, data privacy, and safety.
  • Pricing: We will talk about the pricing for Azure OpenAI, so you can understand how much it will cost to use the service.
  • Deploying Azure OpenAI: We will then show you how to deploy Azure OpenAI in your own applications.
  • Working in Text Models: Finally, we will give you a hands-on tutorial on how to work with text models in Azure OpenAI.

We hope this session will give you a good understanding of Azure OpenAI and how to use it to power your own AI solutions.

See you there!

Amdocs, Magarpatta Inner Circle, Pune, Ma, IN

M365 Saturday Events are FREE events held in different cities around the world, featuring sessions from influential and respected professionals around all (but not exclusively) topics around Microsoft 365 (Office 365, SharePoint, Microsoft Teams, Microsoft Graph, and Power Platform) .

---------------------------------------------
📍 Location: 7th Floor - Breakout area, Amdocs, Tower 2, Magarpatta, Pune
📱 Get the updates on the App.
---------------------------------------------

M365 Saturday Pune is a free community‐focused technology event dedicated to educating and engaging members of the local technical community.

With the expansion of the Microsoft 365 platform, the event now draws upon the expertise of IT professionals, developers and solutions architects who come together to share their real-world experiences, lessons learned, best practices, and general knowledge with other like‐minded individuals.

These individuals bring invaluable experience and lessons across the broad suite of services Microsoft offers like: SharePoint, Microsoft Teams, Microsoft Viva, Power Platform, and other M365 applications.

Kick Start Your Azure OpenAI Journey Step by Step (Part 1 of 3)

Sat, Oct 14, 2023 · 11:00 AM IST
·
Online
Online

Welcome to the 3 part series to kick start your Azure OpenAI journey!

Embarking on your Azure OpenAI journey can be both exciting and rewarding.

In this comprehensive session, we will take you through the foundational steps to get started with the integration of Azure services and OpenAI technologies.

---------------------------------------------

How to join?

  • Join with MS Teams meeting

---------------------------------------------

Covering a range of topics, from understanding ChatGPT and DALL-E2 to exploring Azure OpenAI offerings, you'll gain insights and practical knowledge that will set the stage for your successful venture into the world of AI-powered applications.

We are delighted to have you all join us, as we embark on a journey into the realm of Azure services and OpenAI technologies. In this session, we'll be covering a series of essential concepts that will help you establish a strong foundation for your AI-powered endeavors.

Agenda:

Understanding ChatGPT

  • Introduces ChatGPT, a language model developed by OpenAI for generating human-like text.
  • Explains the capabilities of ChatGPT in natural language understanding and generation.

Introduction to Prompt Engineering

  • Discusses the importance of prompt engineering in guiding AI models to produce desired outputs.
  • Offers insights into crafting effective prompts for various tasks and applications.

Introduction to DALL-E2

  • Introduces DALL-E2, an AI model designed for image generation from textual descriptions.
  • Explains the potential applications and creative possibilities of DALL-E2.

Using ChatGPT

  • Provides a hands-on demonstration of using ChatGPT for various tasks, such as text generation and question answering.
  • Offers practical tips for optimizing interactions with ChatGPT.

Introduction to Azure OpenAI

  • Introduces Azure OpenAI as a platform that brings together the power of Azure services and OpenAI technologies.
  • Highlights the benefits of integrating Azure's infrastructure with OpenAI's AI models.

Azure OpenAI vs OpenAI

  • Compares Azure OpenAI with standalone OpenAI offerings.
  • Discusses the advantages of leveraging Azure's resources for AI model deployment and scalability.

Demos

  • Live demos showcasing the integration of ChatGPT and DALL-E2 within the Azure OpenAI environment.
  • Walks through the process of setting up, interacting with the models, and understanding the results.

See you there!

284 attendees
Went

Viva Learning - Distributing knowledge with the help of your own videos

Fri, Aug 25, 2023 · 6:30 PM IST
·
Online
Online

Functional videos and videos on applications, methods or processes in general have become indispensable in today's world. If we have a problem or have to learn something new, the medium of video helps us immensely. We don't need to read long texts any more, we can just let ourselves be entertained. It only works if the type of person fits.

However, in the meantime, there is always confusion or a lack of understanding when it comes to basic videos. Because often the application is used differently in the company, we proceed differently or have changed the actual standard.

Right now, the employee no longer just needs the basic video from the web, but an individual one that helps them to get to know the application in a way that is important and correct for the company.
Viva Learning offers a possibility that is often not seen. The best thing about it is that the option is already included in the free version.

I'll show you how this works and which option I'm talking about in my session.😊

---------------------------------------------
How to join?

  • Join with MS Teams meeting

---------------------------------------------

Fri, Jun 16, 2023 · 6:30 PM IST
·
Online
Online

Microsoft Build took place on May 23 - 25, 2023

Following Microsoft Build, We will host After Parties to spark conversations around a pre-selected topic, bringing the content closer to our local communities!

---------------------------------------------
How to join?

  • Join with MS Teams meeting

---------------------------------------------

👉 Our After Party topic:
Beyond 300M users: How to bring your Teams app to Outlook and Microsoft 365

If you are already building apps for Microsoft Teams, we have made it easier than ever to develop apps that extend their functionality to other Microsoft 365 services like Outlook and the Microsoft 365 app. Learn how, with the newest version of the Teams Toolkit, the Teams JS SDK, and new unified app manifest, you can expand your skills and create a Teams app project that expands your skills and enables your app to reach your users everywhere they like to work.

---------------------------------------------
Agenda:

  • Welcome & Introduction by Host and Co-Host (15 mins)
  • Playback of Microsoft Build Session (40 mins)
  • Technical Discussion, Q&A led by host (20 mins)
  • Close & Call To Action (15 mins)

The Task Flood: Personally manage and master tasks, THANKS to Microsoft To Do!

Sat, Apr 22, 2023 · 6:00 PM IST
·
Online
Online

It feels like tasks come up in every situation!
Whether it's hidden in an email, through the flower in a phone call, or more recently, even in a Teams chat or Teams channel message.

Somehow, they always make it to you all by themselves! Yet the variety and quantity of tasks are not insignificant.

Hand on heart, which of you has not lost track of your tasks?
And yet it is our ambition to complete tasks punctually and reliably. Sometimes really frustrating!

We would like to show you how you can manage, organize and keep track of your personal tasks thanks to the Microsoft To Do application in Microsoft 365.

In our eyes, Microsoft To Do is not just a task management tool like others, because through synergy effects with Teams or Outlook, even the creation of tasks is simple and easy for us as end users.

How to join?
Join with MS Teams meeting

Global AI Bootcamp, Pune 2023 (In-Person)

Sat, Mar 4, 2023 · 9:30 AM IST
Coditas, 2D, Pune, Ma, IN

The Global AI Bootcamp is a series of free one-day events organized across the world by local communities that are passionate about artificial intelligence on Microsoft Azure.

This year, we are organizing as an in-person event at Coditas, Pune.

A full day of learning about AI
Learn how to implement AI solutions using pre-trained AI services like Cognitive Services and Bot Framework, or by building your own machine learning models with Azure ML and open-source frameworks like PyTorch and ML.NET. By the end of the day, you will be able to infuse AI into your applications.

Unlock the Potential of AI in Power BI

Sat, Feb 18, 2023 · 11:00 AM IST
·
Online
Online

Power BI is a data visualization and business intelligence tool that allows users to connect to various data sources, create interactive dashboards and reports, and share insights with others.

One of its key features is the integration of artificial intelligence (AI) technologies, which enable users to perform advanced data analysis and uncover hidden patterns in their data.

These AI capabilities allow Power BI users to gain new insights into their data, make more informed decisions, and drive better business outcomes.

In this session you will know the AI capabilities in Power BI desktop.

Sat, Dec 17, 2022 · 10:00 AM IST
·
Online
Online

.NET Conf is a FREE, three-day, virtual developer event that celebrates the major releases of the .NET development platform. It is co-organized by the .NET community and Microsoft, and sponsored by the .NET Foundation along with our ecosystem partners.

📱 Get the updates on the App.

How to join?
Join with MS Teams meeting

---------------------------------------------
Agenda:

⏰ 10:00 AM to 10:15 AM IST
Welcome and Introduction
by Nanddeep Nachan and Siddharth Vaghasia (Organizers)
---------------------------------------------

⏰ 10:15 AM to 11:00 AM IST
Build your First .NET MAUI App
by Sundaram Subramanian (Software Developer)
---------------------------------------------

⏰ 11:00 AM to 12:00 PM IST
Clean Architecture with Blazor Web Apps in .NET 7
by Rijwan Ansari (Microsoft MVP, Full Stack .NET Expert)
---------------------------------------------

⏰ 12:00 PM to 01:00 PM IST
Azure Container Apps with . NET
by Swaminathan Vetri (Microsoft MVP)
---------------------------------------------

⏰ 01:00 PM to 02:00 PM IST
Testing Blazor Applications with Playwright
by Viswanatha Swamy (Microsoft MVP)
---------------------------------------------

⏰ 02:00 PM to 02:30 PM IST
🎁 🎁 Quiz, Prize distribution, and Closing notes 🎁🎁
by Smita Nachan and Kunj Sangani (Organizers)
---------------------------------------------

Microsoft Ignite After Party - MS Teams: Supercharge who, where, & how of work

Sat, Nov 26, 2022 · 6:00 PM IST
·
Online
Online

Microsoft Ignite took place on October 12 - 14, 2022.

Following Microsoft Ignite, we are hosting After Parties to spark conversations around a pre-selected topic, bringing the content closer to our local communities!

How to join?

  • Join with MS Teams meeting

Please join us for more details on:
Microsoft Teams: Supercharge the who, where, and how of work

As organizations confront an evolving hybrid world, the post-pandemic era promises to be as disruptive as the pandemic itself. To thrive rather than simply survive, organizations need a single integrated experience powered by data and automation that allows heterogenous teams to work smarter and collaborate seamlessly across locations, time zones, and devices. Join us to learn how Microsoft Teams supports collaboration and productivity at home, in the office, and everywhere in between.

Agenda:

  • Welcome & Introduction by Host and Co-Host (5mins)
  • Playback of Microsoft Ignite Session (30 mins)
  • Technical Discussion, Q&A led by host (20 mins)
  • Close & Call To Action (5 mins)

Went

Sat, Nov 19, 2022 · 6:00 PM IST
·
Online
Online

Microsoft Ignite took place on October 12 - 14, 2022.

Following Microsoft Ignite, we are hosting After Parties to spark conversations around a pre-selected topic, bringing the content closer to our local communities!

How to join?

  • Join with MS Teams meeting

Please join us for more details on:
Introducing Microsoft Syntex – Content AI for the Microsoft Cloud

Microsoft Syntex, announced at Ignite, brings the power of content management and AI together to transform the way we work. This exciting new category and solution is set to help you transform, discover, manage, integrate, and connect your critical organizational content in Microsoft and beyond.

Agenda:

  • Welcome & Introduction by Host and Co-Host (5mins)
  • Playback of Microsoft Ignite Session (30 mins)
  • Technical Discussion, Q&A led by host (20 mins)
  • Close & Call To Action (5 mins)

Azure Data Fundamentals (DP-900)

Sat, Nov 12, 2022 · 10:30 AM IST
·
Online
Online

This session will cover the best Certification preparation guidance for Microsoft Azure Data Fundamentals (DP-900) exam.

DP-900 exam is an opportunity to demonstrate knowledge of core data concepts and related Microsoft Azure data services.

If you are Cloud developer, Azure developer, or .NET developer with aspiration of appearing for Certification Exams, this session is for you, covering below aspects:

  • Core data concepts
  • Considerations for relational data on Azure
  • Considerations for working with non-relational data on Azure
  • Analytics workload on Azure

How to join?
Join with MS Teams

🎤 About the Speaker 🎤
Navneet Naman is working as ETL QA. He has been delivering sessions on DP-900 to help attendess gain the knowlegde and apply the concepts in day-to-day life.

  • LinkedIn

Microsoft Teams PSTN services - Which option to choose to enable it?

Sat, Oct 15, 2022 · 6:00 PM IST
·
Online
Online

This session will help you decide among various options available to enable MS Teams PSTN calling services.

Customer often find themselves in a situation where it gets challenging to choose from one of the available options. The different options available for enabling MS Teams Calling services are:

  1. Operator Connect
  2. Calling Plans
  3. Direct Routing

Learn about decision points for each of these options available, and how the overall solution architecture looks like.

How to join?
Join with MS Teams

🎤 About the Speaker 🎤
Anshu Keserwani is a Unified Communications expert, with over a decade experience in pre-sales, designing and deploying Microsoft UC solutions, along with monitoring & automation tools. He is currently based out of London (UK) and associated with HCL Technologies as a Practice Consultant.

He has helped many customers across the globe in their transformation journey from legacy telephony solutions to UCaaS platform, and provided support in their user adoption programs.

Connect with Anshu:

  • LinkedIn
  • Twitter
  • Blog

Application Developers Day, Pune 2022

Sat, Oct 8, 2022 · 10:00 AM IST
Sagitec Solutions Private Limited, Giga Space IT Park Internal Rd, Pune, Ma, IN

We are excited to host another in-person event at Pune.

Application Developers Day, Pune 2022 is a free community-focused event dedicated to educate and engage members of the technical community.

📱Get the updates on the App.

Our event draws upon the expertise of IT Professionals, Users of Technology, Developers, and Solution Architects who come together to share their real-world experiences, lessons learned, best practices, and general knowledge with other like-minded individuals.

We will be focusing on building enterprise scalable application on Xelence, Zapier, and Microsoft Platforms including .NET, Microsoft 365, Azure, Power Platform, etc.

Privileged Identity Management with Azure AD

Sat, Sep 17, 2022 · 6:00 PM IST
·
Online
Online

Privileged Identity Management (PIM) is a service in Azure Active Directory (Azure AD) that enables you to manage, control, and monitor access to important resources in your organization.
This talk will demonstrate managing PIM role settings, managing their approvals, and eligible, active role assignments.

Join with MS Teams

·
Online
Online

We are excited to kick off the Global Power Platform Bootcamp in Pune, India (Virtual).

This is a free event driven by user groups and communities around the world, backed by Microsoft, for anyone who wants to learn more about Microsoft’s Power Platform.

___________________________________________________________

𝐀𝐭𝐭𝐞𝐧𝐝 𝐓𝐫𝐚𝐜𝐤 1 (𝐌𝐒 𝐓𝐞𝐚𝐦𝐬 𝐦𝐞𝐞𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠):

𝐀𝐭𝐭𝐞𝐧𝐝 𝐓𝐫𝐚𝐜𝐤 2 (𝐌𝐒 𝐓𝐞𝐚𝐦𝐬 𝐦𝐞𝐞𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠):
https://teams.microsoft.com/l/meetup-join/19%3ameeting_ZjYzYjQyMDgtYmY1My00NjVhLTljODktYWUxZTYzNGE4Y2Nj%40thread.v2/0?context=%7b%22Tid%22%3a%22b4c9f32e-da17-4ded-9c95-ce9da38f25d9%22%2c%22Oid%22%3a%2234b297ae-d9e2-4df7-bc2f-b134eacfa0e2%22%7d

___________________________________________________________

𝐀𝐠𝐞𝐧𝐝𝐚:

09:30 AM - 10:00 AM IST
Welcome and Introduction to Global Power Platform Bootcamp 2022 - Pune (Track 1)
by Smita Nachan and Nanddeep Nachan (Organizer)

------------------------------------------------------------

10:00 AM - 11:00 AM IST
Track 1:
𝐏𝐨𝐰𝐞𝐫𝐒𝐡𝐞𝐥𝐥 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐏𝐨𝐰𝐞𝐫 𝐀𝐩𝐩𝐬 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐏𝐨𝐰𝐞𝐫 𝐀𝐮𝐭𝐨𝐦𝐚𝐭𝐞

55 attendees
Went

Microsoft Teams Interoperability with Azure Communication Services

Sat, Jan 22, 2022 · 7:00 PM IST
·
Online
Online

Imagine building an application for the enterprise where you plan to implement a secure connected experience on your website that incorporates a variety of communications modalities like chat, Text (SMS), voice call, video call and screen sharing that enable interaction with Microsoft Teams enterprise users. Each of this modality would require a separate implementation which is both time and resource intensive. Authenticating end users and securing the communication will further add implementation overhead.

Azure Communication Service is introduced to provide opportunities to build digital experience tailored to specific scenarios by using the same chat voice and video experiences and capabilities of Microsoft Teams, billed through Azure (pay what you use).

This session is targeted to developers and technical architects to understand how easy it is to implement an enterprise grade solution to integrate the proven communications capabilities of Microsoft Teams across your apps, websites, mobile and IoT platforms via Azure communication services. It includes a live implementation of Chat and video functionality.

Key takeaway from the session is to understand the service details, which will open a whole realm of opportunities they can imagine for their specific scenarios with an MS Teams enabled enterprise. Session outlines the details of how this service is both cost effective in terms of implementation / maintenance as well as flexible in terms of scalability.

35 attendees
Went

Global AI Bootcamp Pune 2022

Sat, Jan 15, 2022 · 9:30 AM IST
·
Online
Online

The Global AI Bootcamp is a free one-day event organized across the world by local communities that are passionate about artificial intelligence on Microsoft Azure.
We are excited to host the bootcamp at Pune, India.

A full day of learning about AI:
Learn how to implement AI solutions using pre-trained AI services like Cognitive Services and Bot Framework, or by building your own machine learning models with Azure ML and open-source frameworks like PyTorch and ML.NET. By the end of the day, you will be able to infuse AI into your applications.

Accelerate innovation with low-code applications using Power Platform
(https://myignite.microsoft.com/sessions/225eccb7-68f8-4d7b-9f67-4828b20b0a0f)

Leverage fusion teams across your organization to build apps faster than ever before. Fusion teams allow you to accelerate innovation with applications by including representatives throughout your businesses, developers who own those experiences, and your IT leaders and admins managing them. Learn how Power Platform orchestrates this entire process, see some great new features, and hear how our customers are succeeding with low code.

    https://teams.microsoft.com/l/meetup-join/19%3a9d258a99ed8249dc96c5134dc89a57b1%40thread.tacv2/1615714101718?context=%7b%22Tid%22%3a%22b4c9f32e-da17-4ded-9c95-ce9da38f25d9%22%2c%22Oid%22%3a%2234b297ae-d9e2-4df7-bc2f-b134eacfa0e2%22%7d

194 attendees
Went

Working with Azure Kubernetes Service

Sat, Dec 19, 2020 · 7:00 PM IST
·
Online
Online

The new generation programs are being hosted on Containers. Containers are lightweight and powerful.

You can develop your application, package your application as a Container Image, and publish it to a private or public Container Registry. And in your Production environment, you need to pull the Container Image from the Registry and run it with ease.

This mechanism lets you port your application across environments with ease. You may have a scenario where you would host the front-end user interface in a container, backend business logic in a second container, and database in another container.

You need to enable communications across these containers. You may have to manage these containers so that they are scalable, reliable, and highly available. This calls for the need for the Orchestration of Containers.

There are various Container Orchestrators available in the market, and Kubernetes is one of them. Here in this session, we would explore how to build a container, push it to Azure Container Registry, and orchestrate it using Azure Kubernetes Services.

Agenda:

  • Introduction to Containers
  • Introduction to Kubernetes and Azure Kubernetes Service
  • Azure Kubernetes Service: The Big Picture
  • Demo: Push a .NET Core application to Azure Container Registry and orchestrate it on Azure Kubernetes Service
61 attendees

Sat, Nov 7, 2020 · 6:00 PM IST
·
Online
Online

Build your first Low Code Mixed Reality Power Apps with Dhruvin Shah.

In Power Apps, we can build the Mixed Reality application using different Mixed Reality components. We will develop one shopping application with Mixed Reality where we will check different 3D objects in Mixed Reality and check if this will fit to the specific portion.
Also, we will check Measure in MR component where we will measure Area, Volume and Distance in real time and capture all the dimensions in Power Apps.

Global Microsoft 365 Developer Bootcamp 2020 - Pune

Sat, Oct 24, 2020 · 9:00 AM IST
·
Online
Online

Important!

Please reserve your seat by filling out this form:
https://forms.office.com/Pages/ResponsePage.aspx?id=x4s03usaBkSMs5fbAhyttBAbJeGkG-NJs1qTPj8hdytUQURTQVZOUjQ4RUM4VktBQjlVNkc1RE02RC4u

-------

We are excited to kick off the Global Microsoft 365 Developer Bootcamp at Pune, India.

This year’s bootcamps will incorporate the technologies and products that are now included in the Microsoft 365 platform. They will happen worldwide from 01 October through November 30, 2020.

As per global initiative and as asked by attendees, our bootcamp is planned as hands-on-labs. Due to COVID-19, we will approach the things little different and this bootcamp as well will be held online with MS Teams.

About Global Microsoft 365 Developer Bootcamp:
Bootcamps are a free, one-day, hands-on training event led by Microsoft MVPs and community leaders with support from Microsoft. Developers worldwide are invited to attend a bootcamp to learn the latest on Microsoft 365 platform including Microsoft Graph, SharePoint Framework, Microsoft Teams, Office Add-ins, Connectors and Actionable Messages and apply what you learn to your future projects.
See all bootcamp listings at: https://aka.ms/m365devbootcamp

Watch the video to hear from Jeff Teper and Microsoft MVPs on 2019 Global Microsoft 365 Developer Bootcamp.
https://youtu.be/ByVJtysh6mM

Our Bootcamp topic: Extend Microsoft Teams
Microsoft Teams is an extensible platform you can create custom apps on; putting your app at the heart of your organizations collaboration platform. You can build apps for an individual, your team, your organization, or for all Microsoft Teams users everywhere. Learn how to customize and extend Microsoft Teams.

Schedule:
Day 1: 24-Oct (Saturday) 9 AM to 1 PM IST
Day 2: 25-Oct (Sunday) 9 AM to 1 PM IST

Our Speakers / Workshop Proctors:

  • Nanddeep Nachan (Microsoft MVP, MCT / Organizer)
  • Siddharth Vaghasia (Microsoft MVP / Organizer)
  • Smita Nachan (M365 Consultant / Organizer)
  • Kirti Prajapati (Microsoft MVP, MCT)
  • Jayakumar Balasubramaniam (MCT)
  • Keval Solanki (M365 Consultant)
  • Kunj Sangani (M365 Consultant)
  • Shriram Pophali (M365 Consultant)
  • Amey Kalgaonkar (M365 Consultant)

Agenda:

----- Day 1: 24-Oct (Saturday) 9 AM to 1 PM IST -----
09:00 AM - 09:15 AM
Introduction to Global Microsoft 365 Developer Bootcamp 2020 - Pune
by Nanddeep Nachan (Organizer)

09:15 AM - 09:45 AM

by Rabia Williams (Microsoft)

Introduction to building apps for Microsoft Teams (Theory)
by Smita Nachan (M365 Consultant)

Create interactive conversational bots for Microsoft Teams (Workshop)
by Siddharth Vaghasia (Microsoft MVP)

----- Day 2: 25-Oct (Sunday) 9 AM to 1 PM IST -----

12:45 PM - 01:00 PM

50 attendees

Intellectual Property 101 - From Awareness to Understanding

Sat, Sep 5, 2020 · 6:00 PM IST
·
Online
Online

Get introduced to fundamentals concepts of Intellectual Property
(IP) and types of protection. Broadly the program addresses life cycles of different types of IP, type of protections, jurisdictional requirements, and other topics covering the How’s, When’s and Why’s of IP. Understand Do’s and Don’ts, setting a baseline for further discussions on strategies for filing and leveraging the IP assets.

Attendees of this webinar should walk away with many practical takeaways to help them build a basic understanding of the different types of intellectual property and best practices to seek protection.

Agenda:
• Understand different types of IP – Industrial Property (Patents, Trademark, Geographical Indication and Industrial Design), Copyrights, and Trade Secrets.
• Understand processes, validity, jurisdictional requirements and rights of the different types of IP.
• The why’s, The when’s and the how’s of the IP.
• Patent - Term, Registration Process in India, What is patentable/ what is not, Importance of patents, Myths, Do's and Don'ts

About Speaker:
Harsh is a Founder of IP-FY, an IP Consulting division under Two52 Clearlydefined IP Consulting LLP, operational from Belgaum and Bangalore, India.
Harsh has a diverse professional experience of 15 years working with companies like Infosys Technologies Ltd and Tata Elxsi India Pvt Ltd., in the field of Engineering and Technology and with SAP Labs India Pvt Ltd in the field of Intellectual Property.
Harsh is registered to practice as a Patent Agent with the Intellectual Property Office, India and holds a Master of Science degree from Syracuse University, Syracuse, NY.

29 attendees

Accelerate SPFx development with PnP

Sat, Aug 29, 2020 · 6:00 PM IST
·
Online
Online

SharePoint Patterns & Practices (PnP) is a vibrant open source community of samples and content essential for any SharePoint Developer. PnP provides libraries and tools actively used across thousands of Office 365 tenancies. Discover PnP resources available to help accelerate your SharePoint Framework developments and deployments.
You’ll likely discover a new sample or library that will save you time!

Agenda:

  • PnP Overview
  • Discover PnP resources
  • Use PnP resources in your SPFx solutions

Explore SharePoint Spaces

Sat, Aug 8, 2020 · 12:00 PM IST
·
Online
Online

Get introduced to SharePoint Spaces. Create and share, secure and extensible mixed reality experiences.

Agenda:

  • What is SharePoint Spaces?
  • Characteristics of SharePoint Spaces
  • Real-Life Examples where SharePoint Spaces can be used

  • Add 3D Objects to SharePoint Space for the next level of learning
  • Add 360° virtual tour for your organization
  • Prepare 360° Organizational chart to SharePoint Space for next level of Onboarding Process

Basics of SharePoint Framework with React

Sat, Jul 25, 2020 · 4:30 PM IST
·
Online
Online

This session will cover basics of React from SPFx development perspective, creating a SPFx Web part, and adding a new web part to an existing solution.

Agenda:

  • Introduction to SPFx
  • React Components
  • State and Props in React
  • SPFx Web Part deployment
  • Fluent UI (earlier Office Fabric UI)

Target Audience:

  • No prior knowledge of React and SPFx is required.
  • Should have development knowledge in SharePoint
